modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help getting home safely from downtown on weekends.

full_description_text: So, I was talking to this person on the phone, and they were like, "How do I get home safely from downtown on the weekend?" They seemed a bit worried about getting back after a night out, you know? They just wanted to make sure they had a safe way to get home, especially since it can be tricky on weekends.
short_description: Need help getting home safely from downtown on weekends.
description: So, I was talking to this person on the phone, and they were like, "How do I get home safely from downtown on the weekend?" They seemed a bit worried about getting back after a night out, you know? They just wanted to make sure they had a safe way to get home, especially since it can be tricky on weekends.
